Our Story

A Gateway Built for Grand Occasions

Past the carved golden archway and down the long stone driveway, LN Convention & Banquet Halls opens into manicured lawns and twin glass-fronted banquet halls — built for weddings, receptions, engagements, birthdays and corporate gatherings alike.

Every detail, from the temple-style entrance gate to the warm landscape lighting along the lawns, is designed so the arrival feels like an event in itself, long before the celebration begins.

It's a simple philosophy that runs through everything here: open the halls and lawns to every kind of celebration, and look after each guest with the same warmth — whatever the occasion.

What's Inside

Spaces for Every Celebration

Two grand halls, open lawns and a kitchen guests keep talking about — everything a celebration in Telangana calls for, under one roof.

Grand Banquet Halls

Two expansive, glass-fronted halls with cool, comfortable interiors — equally suited to an intimate ceremony or a packed reception.

The Open Lawns

A wide, manicured lawn framed by palms and the golden temple-style gateway — the venue's favourite backdrop for outdoor ceremonies and photographs.

Dining & Catering

In-house catering that reviewers consistently call out for its flavour, served across both indoor halls and the open lawns.

Arrival & Parking

Easy access straight off the highway, with ample on-site parking — guests arrive without the usual event-day scramble.

Climate Comfort

Well-maintained air conditioning across both indoor halls, keeping every gathering comfortable regardless of the Telangana heat.

Decor & Ambience

Warm architectural lighting and detailed interiors that guests describe as calm and premium from the moment they step in.

A Closer Look

Glimpses of LN

A few frames from the drive up to the venue — the same approach every guest takes on the day of your celebration.

Plan Your Celebration
